series_metadata.series_description: A record of the Ohio Department of Job and Family Services’(ODJFS) adjustments that document the Agency’s funding expenditures and changes in dollaramount. File includes, but is not limited to, a description of action taken, or coding of previouslycompleted transaction/payment documentation. Information is electronically forwarded for enteringinto the Ohio Administrative Knowledge System (OAKS the State of Ohio’s computer system).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 3 years or untilimaged, indexed and quality controlis completed, then destroy providedno longer of further value. ; Electronic: Retain 10 years, then destroyprovided state and federal audits arecompleted, audit reports arereleased, and all discrepancies areresolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
